computed.name: Check if the slip has been validated
Check if the slip has clauses validation
Check if the slip has been compared
computed.formula:
let CQP_GEMINI_FILE_COMPARE = this.CQP_GEMINI_FILE_COMPARE
let CQP_NEW_FILE_UPLOAD = this.CQP_NEW_FILE_UPLOAD
let CQP_VALIDATE_SLIP_ACTION = this.CQP_VALIDATE_SLIP_ACTION
let CQP_RENEWAL_CARGO = this.CQP_RENEWAL_CARGO

if ((CQP_NEW_FILE_UPLOAD != CQP_GEMINI_FILE_COMPARE || CQP_NEW_FILE_UPLOAD == null || CQP_VALIDATE_SLIP_ACTION) && CQP_RENEWAL_CARGO == "YES") {
    return true
}

return false
